title: primula capitata subsp. crispata
intro: Primula capitata subsp. crispata, also known as the Alpine Primrose, is a species of flowering plant in the family Primulaceae. This plant is primarily used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent effects. The health benefits of Primula capitata subsp. crispata include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe skin irritations, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
